vocab.meaning: biểu tượng của địa vị/sự giàu sang
vocab.example: To be honest, I'm not into cars that serve merely as a status symbol; I value utility and safety over brand prestige.

vocab.meaning: bình thường, không có gì nổi trội (trung dung)
vocab.example: I generally opt for middle-of-the-road vehicles that are reliable and won't draw too much unwanted attention.

vocab.meaning: dẫn đầu xu thế/đi trước thời đại
vocab.example: I'm a huge fan of Tesla models because their software integration is truly ahead of the curve compared to traditional car makers.

vocab.meaning: tốt cả đôi đường (kết hợp được ưu điểm của hai thứ khác nhau)
vocab.example: Plug-in hybrids are my favorite because they offer the best of both worlds: electric efficiency for the city and petrol for long trips.
My dream is to own a supercar that can go like the wind on an open motorway, though that's hardly practical for my daily commute.
